CHANGE RECORD 
 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By

All

references to CMEMS.

REP

2.3

figures. Minor edits.

1.7 2017-01-16 all Add L3 REP product Jos de Kloe C. Wettre 
 2017-03-16 1.3, 
2.1, 
3.1, 
4.1,  
7

for curl.div, add figure 1, add

field, and one extra reference

and added ERS-1/ERS-2 REP data

1.9 2018-01-26  Rebranded from OSI TAC to WIND 
TAC

and Scatsat-1 OSCAT NRT data. 
Some editing. 
M. Belmonte Ad Stoffelen 
1.11 2019-09-04  Added Metop-C ASCAT data Rianne Giesen  
1.12 2019-12-16  Textual clarifications after review; 
added list of data gaps caused by 
unavailable upstream data in 
Chapter V. 
Rianne Giesen, Ad 
Stoffelen 
Mercator Ocean 
1.13 2020-06-24  Figure and EAN updates after 
review. Name change of L4 REP 
product and textual clarifications. 
Updated list of data gaps to include 
2019

Isabel Garcia 
Hermosa, Rianne 
Giesen

Added information about time 
series extension and L3 quality flags. 
Updated list of data gaps. 
Rianne Giesen  Ad Stoffelen

updated list of data gaps.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document for the Global Ocean Wind Product, detailing its production subsystem description and quality information.
